_comment: P4-WRITE demo seed: a DENY-ONLY Caddy edge (just the abort catch-all) used to seed BOTH the front (vps) and downstream (home) in-process fakes for settings-chain-write.json. Each edge starts empty so a single `crenel expose <svc> --auth authelia` can be shown LANDING the coordinated front-forward + downstream-route + DNS as one read-back-verified transaction. Reads as default-deny ENFORCED.
